architecture.summary: Existing crawl-worker with vendor-org-discovery source, KV edge search + Postgres fallback, trusted-orgs.ts as vendor/trust registry, deploy.sh for VM deployment

integrations.summary: GitHub Trees API for vendor repo scanning, KV sharded search index, Postgres tsvector fulltext, InlineSubmitter for bulk submissions, VM deploy via deploy.sh

ui-ux.summary: CLI TTY output in find.ts shows formatted skill entries, JSON mode for piped output, tab-separated non-TTY format

performance.summary: N/A - no new performance surfaces; dedup is in-memory post-fetch, edge search already sub-50ms

security.summary: N/A - uses existing INTERNAL_BROADCAST_KEY for admin endpoints, no new auth surfaces

edge-cases.summary: Dedup canonical selection by highest star count within same ownerSlug+skillSlug group, alternateRepos for collapsed entries, backward-compatible trusted-orgs exports
